competition_rating_events_before_values_.name: competition_rating_events_before_values_check
competition_rating_events_before_values_.value:
"competition_rating_events"."before_mu" IS NULL
    OR ("competition_rating_events"."before_mu" NOT IN ('NaN'::float8, 'Infinity'::float8, '-Infinity'::float8)
      AND "competition_rating_events"."before_sigma" NOT IN ('NaN'::float8, 'Infinity'::float8, '-Infinity'::float8)
      AND "competition_rating_events"."before_sigma" > 0)

competition_rating_events_after_check.name: competition_rating_events_after_check
competition_rating_events_after_check.value:
"competition_rating_events"."after_mu" NOT IN ('NaN'::float8, 'Infinity'::float8, '-Infinity'::float8)
    AND "competition_rating_events"."after_sigma" NOT IN ('NaN'::float8, 'Infinity'::float8, '-Infinity'::float8)
    AND "competition_rating_events"."after_sigma" > 0

competition_receipts_status_values_check.name: competition_receipts_status_values_check
competition_receipts_status_values_check.value:
("competition_receipts"."eligibility_status" = 'eligible'
      AND "competition_receipts"."placement" BETWEEN 1 AND "competition_receipts"."lobby_size"
      AND "competition_receipts"."eligibility_reason" IS NULL)
    OR ("competition_receipts"."eligibility_status" = 'ineligible'
      AND "competition_receipts"."base_points" = 0
      AND "competition_receipts"."field_bonus" = 0
      AND "competition_receipts"."total_points" = 0
      AND "competition_receipts"."eligibility_reason" IS NOT NULL)

game_cost_rollups_scope_owner_check.name: game_cost_rollups_scope_owner_check
game_cost_rollups_scope_owner_check.value:
("game_cost_rollups"."rollup_scope" = 'game' AND "game_cost_rollups"."owner_epoch" IS NULL)
    OR ("game_cost_rollups"."rollup_scope" = 'owner_epoch' AND "game_cost_rollups"."owner_epoch" IS NOT NULL)

game_cost_rollups_counts_check.name: game_cost_rollups_counts_check
game_cost_rollups_counts_check.value:
"game_cost_rollups"."call_count" >= 0
    AND "game_cost_rollups"."failed_call_count" >= 0
    AND "game_cost_rollups"."unpriced_call_count" >= 0
    AND "game_cost_rollups"."prompt_tokens" >= 0
    AND "game_cost_rollups"."cached_tokens" >= 0
    AND "game_cost_rollups"."completion_tokens" >= 0
    AND "game_cost_rollups"."reasoning_tokens" >= 0
    AND "game_cost_rollups"."total_tokens" >= 0
    AND "game_cost_rollups"."actual_cost_microusd" >= 0
    AND "game_cost_rollups"."estimated_cost_microusd" >= 0

game_postgame_media_snapshot_provenance_.name: game_postgame_media_snapshot_provenance_check
game_postgame_media_snapshot_provenance_.value:
("game_postgame_media"."render_input_snapshot" IS NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."render_input_snapshot_hash" IS NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."render_input_snapshot_version" IS NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."artifact_version" IS NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."renderer_version" IS NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."timing_contract_version" IS NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."music_asset_id" IS NULL)
    OR ("game_postgame_media"."render_input_snapshot" IS NOT NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."render_input_snapshot_hash" IS NOT NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."render_input_snapshot_version" > 0
      AND "game_postgame_media"."artifact_version" IS NOT NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."renderer_version" IS NOT NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."timing_contract_version" IS NOT NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."music_asset_id" IS NOT NULL)

game_postgame_media_current_ready_check.name: game_postgame_media_current_ready_check
game_postgame_media_current_ready_check.value:
("game_postgame_media"."current_ready_render_version" IS NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."current_ready_duration_ms" IS NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."current_ready_artifact_metadata" IS NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."current_ready_published_at" IS NULL)
    OR ("game_postgame_media"."current_ready_render_version" IS NOT NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."current_ready_duration_ms" IS NOT NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."current_ready_artifact_metadata" IS NOT NULL
      AND "game_postgame_media"."current_ready_published_at" IS NOT NULL)

game_provider_spend_entries_cost_counts_.name: game_provider_spend_entries_cost_counts_check
game_provider_spend_entries_cost_counts_.value:
("game_provider_spend_entries"."actual_cost_microusd" IS NULL OR "game_provider_spend_entries"."actual_cost_microusd" >= 0)
    AND ("game_provider_spend_entries"."estimated_cost_microusd" IS NULL OR "game_provider_spend_entries"."estimated_cost_microusd" >= 0)
    AND ("game_provider_spend_entries"."latency_ms" IS NULL OR "game_provider_spend_entries"."latency_ms" >= 0)

game_watch_state_summaries_projection_co.name: game_watch_state_summaries_projection_counts_check
game_watch_state_summaries_projection_co.value:
"game_watch_state_summaries"."projection_event_count" >= 0
    AND "game_watch_state_summaries"."projection_trusted_event_count" >= 0
    AND "game_watch_state_summaries"."projection_valid_prefix_length" >= 0
    AND "game_watch_state_summaries"."projection_last_trusted_sequence" >= 0
    AND ("game_watch_state_summaries"."projection_first_invalid_sequence" IS NULL OR "game_watch_state_summaries"."projection_first_invalid_sequence" > 0)

mcp_oauth_access_tokens_scope_check.name: mcp_oauth_access_tokens_scope_check
mcp_oauth_access_tokens_scope_check.value: "mcp_oauth_access_tokens"."scope" IN ('agents:read', 'agents:read agents:write', 'games:read', 'agents:read games:read', 'agents:read agents:write games:read', 'producer', 'agents:read producer', 'agents:read agents:write producer', 'games:read producer', 'agents:read games:read producer', 'agents:read agents:write games:read producer')

mcp_oauth_authorization_codes_scope_chec.name: mcp_oauth_authorization_codes_scope_check
mcp_oauth_authorization_codes_scope_chec.value: "mcp_oauth_authorization_codes"."scope" IN ('agents:read', 'agents:read agents:write', 'games:read', 'agents:read games:read', 'agents:read agents:write games:read', 'producer', 'agents:read producer', 'agents:read agents:write producer', 'games:read producer', 'agents:read games:read producer', 'agents:read agents:write games:read producer')

mcp_oauth_clients_scope_check.name: mcp_oauth_clients_scope_check
mcp_oauth_clients_scope_check.value: "mcp_oauth_clients"."scope" IN ('agents:read', 'agents:read agents:write', 'games:read', 'agents:read games:read', 'agents:read agents:write games:read', 'producer', 'agents:read producer', 'agents:read agents:write producer', 'games:read producer', 'agents:read games:read producer', 'agents:read agents:write games:read producer')
